title: Ethics and public health - PubMed
content: Full text links Cite Display options Display options Format Abstract PubMed PMID Abstract This paper examines the differences between clinical and public health ethics and provides several examples of contemporary public health challenges that pose ethical questions. The relations among ethics, rights and obligations are explored, because public health philosophers propose these as different ways for public health to align its activities to what we value. Resources for education in relation to the ethics of public health are identified. PubMed Disclaimer Comment in Evolutionary morality and public health. Baschetti R. Baschetti R. Intern Med J. 2005 Jun;35(6):372-3; author reply 373. doi: 10.1111/j.1445-5994.2005.00838.x. Intern Med J. 2005. PMID: 15892771 No abstract available.
